title: Puzzled's Custom Animals
description: A resource pack that makes the Minecraft animals cuter but still staying true to the vanilla style! :)
body:
REQUIRES FABRIC, CEM & ETF:

 

This resource pack changes the look of the Cows, Pigs, Sheep, Horses and Chickens. The pack stays true to the vanilla Minecraft style but just adds extra features.

 

Cows: Floppy ears, a snout, mouth/jaw and tail. Variant 1 (M); Horns but no udder. Variant 2 (F): No horns with udder

Pigs: Floppy ears, mouth/jaw, and tail. Variant's: 4 stages that get progressively more muddy. 

Sheep: Cuter face, floppy ears, snout and tail.

Horses: Better mane with bangs. Variant: replaced the spotty texture with one inspired by the Clydesdale (big fluffy feet)

Chickens: Larger beak. New rooster/cockerel variant with a red wattle and comb.

 

Individual Animal Packs (Coming VERY Soon)

Optifine Pack (Coming VERY Soon)

 

Created By APuzzledSlime 

Twitch, Youtube, TikTok and Twitter :)
